Appearance

Cyber (Default)

Standard high-fidelity dark mode with neon highlights, optimized for low-light environments.

Red (High Alert)

High-intensity interface with striking red accents.

Neon Green

High-contrast aesthetic using bright neon greens for maximum visibility.

Deep Blue

Sleek midnight blue aesthetic with a calm, focused look.

Grayscale

High-contrast monochrome theme. Minimalist and focused.

Light Mode

A clean white and blue aesthetic, ideal for presentations and bright environments.

Saved locally

Your theme is stored in this browser and will persist across sessions on this device.

HexaShield · Appearance
